name: Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together 1 cup all-purpose white flour, ½ tsp sugar, and ½ tsp salt with a fork.
2. Drizzle ⅓ cup of Canola or safflower oil over the dry ingredients, then add 1½ tbsp skim milk.
3. Stir until crumbly using fingertips or a fork.
4. Pat the dough onto a 9-inch plate, ensuring an even layer without thick corners.
5. Press a floured fork around the edges to crimp.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes before use. The crust can be prepared up to 2 days in advance and stored covered in the refrigerator or frozen for up to 1 month.
